mission_name: DSPy Program of Thought SOP Refactoring Planning
technical_learnings: DSPy Program of Thought offers significant intelligence benefits but requires hybrid architecture to preserve TDD gate reliability
Current SOP system consists of 1,400+ lines of deterministic bash/python scripts with hardcoded validation rules
TDD gates must remain 100% blocking and bypass-proof - this is non-negotiable for system reliability
Hybrid approach with 3 layers (Critical Deterministic + DSPy Intelligence + Integration Logic) provides optimal balance
Performance impact acceptable (<10 seconds) for intelligent validation while maintaining immediate critical path blocking
challenges_overcome: Complex trade-off analysis between reliability and intelligence
Balancing current system's speed with DSPy's adaptive capabilities
Ensuring proposal aligns with existing LightRAG DSPy phase2 integration infrastructure
Creating implementation roadmap with proper risk mitigation and rollback strategies
critical_insights: Stakeholder decision framework with clear voting options essential for architectural decisions
Risk mitigation strategies (TDD gate fortification, performance guardrails, consistency verification) are prerequisites
Success metrics must be quantitative and measurable - 60% maintenance reduction, 40% accuracy improvement targets
Integration with existing systems (beads, ACE framework, DSPy phase2) reduces technical debt
friction_points: Manual reflection capture failed due to path issues - need to fix reflect skill paths
LSP errors in unrelated files suggest broader system maintenance needs
Browser cleanup script has syntax errors affecting RTB workflow
process_improvements: Architectural decision template should be standardized for future proposals
Global index integration critical for documentation discoverability
Hybrid architecture pattern applicable to other legacy system modernization efforts
